title: Agent registry item (GET /agents)
description: One fleet agent's identity + autonomy row. As-built source of truth: the tracker `agents` table (/home/docker/tasks/src/lib/server/db.js) — the ENFORCED side of lane/capability routing (claimNextForAgent/assignTaskToAgent look capabilities up here server-side). `capabilities` is a CSV of tags in the store; this read serves it as a string array. `active` and `autonomy` are stored as INTEGER/TEXT; served as boolean/enum. Identity converges to a Library item later; this read is stable across that migration (same fields, different backing store). Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

handle.description: Canonical lowercase agent id (primary key), e.g. 'glenn'.

lane.description: Coarse lane label (open|work|lab|...; advisory — capabilities is the real gate).

capabilities.description: Capability tags the agent MAY work (the lane gate). CSV in the store; served as an array.

autonomy.description: Autonomy mode. Advisory today except 'paused' (with active=false, treated as 'can work nothing' by claim/assign).

active.description: false = retired/disabled -> claims nothing. Stored as INTEGER 0/1; served as boolean.
